name: write-form-intro-copy
query: Can you write better wording for the privacy notice paragraph on our Tally intake form? It sounds too formal.
expected_behavior: Routes to copywriting (or microcopy for short strings) to draft the improved wording first
Does not call any Tally MCP tools (load_form/update_text/save_form) purely for drafting prose
Only reaches for the tally skill's tool-mechanics once the final wording is decided and needs to be pushed into the form
_notes: Wording/persuasive copy requests should route to copywriting or microcopy, not the tally structural-edit skill.
